sizes.label: XS & S Kit
sizes.tip: Extra Small & Small — ideal if you are between sizes.

sizes.label: S & M Kit
sizes.tip: Small & Medium — the most popular starter combo.

sizes.label: M & L Kit
sizes.tip: Medium & Large — for a wider ear canal.

sizeSetFromQuiz: Size set based on your answers
descriptionBody: Earasers use a patented open-canal design combined with a V-Filter to reduce harmful sound levels while preserving the natural richness of music.
specsBody: Measured according to ISO 11904-1. Values are average attenuation per test frequency.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: These Earasers are perfect. They fit in very nicely, are barely visible, and balance the sound perfectly.

reviews.name: Saskia H.
reviews.text: Much better and cheaper than all the custom-fitted earplugs from established brands that I have had!

reviews.name: Joanne C.
reviews.text: Great customer service — they sent me the mediums plus the filter removal tool free of charge!
